prompt: A candid street photograph of a young Thai woman at a Bangkok night market food stall, well past midnight. The subject leans slightly forward examining charcoal-grilled skewers, wearing a casual crop top and denim shorts, expression relaxed and completely natural, not posed. The setting is a narrow market alley: charcoal smoke rising from the grill, handwritten Thai-script price tags taped to the stall edge, a neon beer sign partially visible in the far background. Lighting comes from the amber charcoal grill below her face mixing with a cool fluorescent tube above the stall, creating dual-toned shadows along her neck and jaw. Composition: medium close-up, eye-level, subject occupies left two-thirds of frame, blurred vendor and food stall crowd filling right side. Color palette: warm amber, deep shadow zones, subtle cool neon accent in distance, muted earthy market tones. Render with photographic realism: subtle film grain throughout, avoid over-smoothed CG textures, preserve natural imperfections. Skin should show subsurface scattering and micro-texture, not digital smoothing. Hair: subtle natural imperfection, not geometric perfection. Photorealistic rendering, no watermark.
